name: restaurant managers overseeing 5–15 locations tool
description: For restaurant managers overseeing 5–15 locations, compliance risks from health inspection scores cause potential fines and operational disruptions. We provide real-time alerts instead of manual tracking of health inspection scores.
problem_solved: Compliance risks from health inspection scores.
